subcodes.first_line: O servant of the threshold of the Friend, when the Sun of Reality shed its radiance from the horizon of the Most Holy Bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان حضرت دوست شمس حقیقت چون از افق فیض اقدس اشراق فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within
